title: Breaking bad
permissionStatus: pending — metadata-only archive stub; awaiting ShoreVest-supplied source material
summary: Covers China’s bad-loan market during an earlier phase of the credit cycle; included as historical context for how NPL resolution was discussed before later real estate-sector stress.

body.text: This ShoreVest-hosted archival record was created during the July 2026 media-page link audit using the approved archive metadata from media.html. Covers China’s bad-loan market during an earlier phase of the credit cycle; included as historical context for how NPL resolution was discussed before later real estate-sector stress.
